## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Safety and Quality Checklist

- [ ] This PR does not include API keys, tokens, private prompts, or private meeting content.
- [ ] This PR does not add special-case logic for a fixed company, fixed topic, fixed model, or one-off test prompt.
- [ ] If this PR changes Evidence Search, it includes Evidence Debug output, regression tests, or a clear search-quality validation note.
- [ ] User-facing text remains understandable for non-developer users.

## Notes

Add screenshots, Evidence Debug excerpts, or follow-up notes here if useful.
